public_landing.landing_6: Say goodbye to static PDF. Transform your experience into a
public_landing.landing_8: with an AI assistant that assists recruiters 24/7.
public_landing.landing_11: Why your CV in PDF and LinkedIn are no longer enough
public_landing.landing_12: LinkedIn maps your history, but it doesn't start valuable conversations. Recruiters take only
public_landing.landing_14: in discarding a flat PDF. Exceptional talent needs a platform that demonstrates their true capabilities interactively.
public_landing.landing_16: A static PDF CV that no one reads in its entirety and gets lost in the inbox.
public_landing.landing_17: A monotonous list of LinkedIn positions with no context.
public_landing.landing_18: Wait weeks for a first technical validation interview.
public_landing.landing_20: An AI Assistant that sells your profile and answers technical questions instantly.
public_landing.landing_21: Premium designs (Bento Grid) that immediately capture attention.
public_landing.landing_22: B2B Semantic Search: Companies find you based on your real skills.
public_landing.landing_23: Raise your Employability to the Next Level
public_landing.landing_24: World-class tools designed for professionals to show their real impact and companies to optimize their recruiting.
public_landing.landing_26: Your Digital Clone answers questions from recruiters strictly using your experience (RAG). Work for yourself while you sleep, nailing the interview before the interview.
public_landing.landing_28: Don't waste time configuring. Upload your old PDF and our wizard will extract and build your entire professional database in seconds using generative AI.
public_landing.landing_30: Stand out instantly. Choose from 5 cutting-edge visual themes (such as Cyber ​​Neon or Dark Glass) and dynamic architectures (Bento Grid) that demonstrate high professional quality.
public_landing.landing_32: Get on the Hunters' radar. Companies use our semantic search and AI Court to simultaneously evaluate multiple candidates, connecting you directly to real offers.
public_landing.landing_34: Find out exactly what companies are asking by reading your AI Chat logs. When there is mutual interest, connect immediately through our professional network and built-in real-time messaging.
public_landing.landing_36: "Reviewing a portfolio in OppyTalent saved me 30 minutes of initial technical interview. I asked the candidate's Digital Clone about their role as Lead and it gave me precise details that a PDF would never have told me. Incredible platform."
public_landing.landing_39: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Portfolios
public_landing.landing_40: Everything you need to know before creating your Digital Twin.
public_landing.landing_41: How does the AI ​​Digital Clone work in my portfolio?
public_landing.landing_42: The interactive wizard uses a RAG (Recovery Augmented Generation) system. It is powered exclusively by the experience and projects that you approve in your profile. When a recruiter asks, AI injects that context to respond with your own skills, ensuring you "sell" your talent without hallucinating answers.
public_landing.landing_43: Why choose OppyTalent instead of my LinkedIn profile?
public_landing.landing_44: LinkedIn is essential for getting discovered, but OppyTalent is designed to
public_landing.landing_46: . While LinkedIn is a static list, OppyTalent allows the recruiter to have a technical pre-interview with your Digital Clone. Additionally, our premium architectural design (Bento Grid, Glassmorphism) dramatically elevates the perception of your professional quality.
public_landing.landing_47: Is my data safe if it uses Artificial Intelligence?
public_landing.landing_48: Absolutely. We use an Enterprise model with BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) support. This means you can plug your own AI API Key encrypted into our database with AES-256. You will have absolute control of your information.

public_features.features_6: Your Digital Clone with RAG Architecture

public_features.features_16: What experience do you have leading teams?
public_features.features_18: I have led teams of up to 8 developers at MercadoTech for 3 years. I was responsible for the migration to microservices, managing to reduce time-to-market by 40%. If you are interested, you can see more in the "Experience" section.

public_features.features_41: . You can connect your own Google Gemini API key to process the AI. We encrypt your key with cryptography

public_features.features_59: Thousands of hours saved on irrelevant interviews. Configure your portfolio, activate your Digital Clone and let technology speak for you.

public_talent.talent_5: The labor market is broken. While you send dozens of resumes that no one reads, recruiters are desperately looking for talent. OppyTalent is your 24/7 PR agent.
public_talent.talent_8: You send 50 CVs in PDF format. Maybe 5 are open. A recruiter looks at it for 6 seconds and, not seeing the exact keyword in the first paragraph, discards your profile even if you are the ideal candidate. You are playing the lottery.
public_talent.talent_10: Your profile is indexed by our B2B Semantic Search. When a Hunter searches for “scalability expert,” they find you. They enter your portfolio, ask your Digital Clone about your projects, and the AI ​​convinces them to schedule an interview.
public_talent.talent_11: Why do the best use OppyTalent?
public_talent.talent_12: Designed to maximize your employability without additional effort.
public_talent.talent_14: Your AI assistant is trained with your profile (RAG). Answer technical questions and defend your architecture decisions in front of recruiters at 3 AM.
public_talent.talent_16: Discover what you are missing for your next promotion. Read chat logs to know exactly what technologies companies are looking for in your profile.
public_talent.talent_18: You are not just a web link. You are part of a database where hundreds of recruiters use our
public_talent.talent_23: The source code does not explain the impact on the business. Your Digital Clone can explain to a non-technical recruiter how your microservices architecture saved $10k per month on AWS.
public_talent.talent_28: Leadership is difficult to capture in a PDF. Use OppyTalent to showcase metrics, KPIs, applied agile methodologies, and how you took products from idea to launch.
public_talent.talent_31: ✓ AI negotiates and profiles your work culture
public_talent.talent_33: A resume without design is a sin for a creative. Take advantage of our Bento Grid and Glassmorphism themes to make your portfolio your best visual cover letter.
public_talent.talent_38: "I had been sending my PDF for 6 months without responses. I uploaded my CV to the OppyTalent Wizard, I configured the Digital Clone and a week later they contacted me through the platform's internal chat. The recruiter had already 'interviewed' my AI. I got the Senior Backend position."
public_talent.talent_42: "As a DevOps it is very difficult to explain my work on a page of paper. OppyTalent allowed me to detail the architecture of each project. The best thing was to see in the analytics how a Hunter asked my AI about Kubernetes."
public_talent.talent_46: Your Digital Clone is waiting for you
public_talent.talent_47: 90% of the work is done by our AI assistant by extracting your current CV. Create your premium portfolio today and change the rules of the game.

public_b2b.b2b_5: Manual technical validation is slow and expensive. OppyTalent B2B introduces Semantic Search and the first
public_b2b.b2b_7: of the market, reducing the initial selection time by 80%.
public_b2b.b2b_12: . If you need a scalability expert and the candidate wrote "I migrated monoliths to microservices," the filter discards them. In addition, you spend hours of your technical team in first interviews to discover that the candidate did not have the real level.
public_b2b.b2b_16: . Find similar profiles even if they don't use the same words. And before bothering your Tech Lead, you yourself can ask advanced technical questions to the candidate's "Digital Clone" to validate their real experience in 5 minutes.
public_b2b.b2b_19: "I'm looking for a Vue Dev with experience in banking integrations." Our engine uses vectors to understand intent and returns profiles sorted by % real affinity.
public_b2b.b2b_21: Select up to 5 talents and ask them a technical question ("How would you optimize a slow query in PostgreSQL?"). The digital clones will respond instantly and the AI ​​Moderator will give you a comparative verdict.
public_b2b.b2b_23: Once validated, drag the candidate to your B2B Kanban board. Start a live chat (P2P) with the real talent from the same platform and make the final offer.
public_b2b.b2b_24: The magic of evaluating in parallel
public_b2b.b2b_25: This is how our AI Court (Asynchronous Evaluation) works.
public_b2b.b2b_27: "How would you handle traffic spikes of 100k requests/minute?"
public_b2b.b2b_31: "In my last project in FinTech I implemented an auto-scaling architecture in Kubernetes (EKS) with SQS queues to absorb peaks without saturating the relational DB..."
public_b2b.b2b_35: "I would use a load balancer and increase the size of the servers. I would also put a Redis in front for caching."
public_b2b.b2b_38: demonstrated real experience handling asynchrony (SQS) and orchestration (EKS) to solve the root problem.
public_b2b.b2b_40: proposed a generic theoretical solution (vertical scaling).
public_b2b.b2b_44: Join companies that are already reducing their "Time to Hire" drastically by interacting with the Digital Twins of the best tech talent.

public_pricing.pricing_4: Prices designed to boost talent in Latin America and scale to the world. Choose the plan that suits your professional moment or the size of your company.
public_pricing.pricing_8: To build your first digital footprint with AI.
public_pricing.pricing_17: For talents seeking to stand out in the international market.
public_pricing.pricing_29: Full control. Connect your own Artificial Intelligence API Key.
public_pricing.pricing_33: Pay AI directly to Google at actual cost
public_pricing.pricing_35: All analytics and Pro features included
public_pricing.pricing_49: Massive processes, automation and collaborative team.
public_pricing.pricing_60: What currency do you use and what payment methods do you accept?
public_pricing.pricing_61: All our prices are expressed in United States Dollars (USD) as it is a global SaaS standard. We accept all credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AMEX) through Stripe, guaranteeing smooth local payments in Latin America and the world.
public_pricing.pricing_62: What does the Hacker plan (BYOK) mean?
public_pricing.pricing_63: It stands for "Bring Your Own Key." For a fraction of the monthly cost, you access all of OppyTalent's premium software, but AI interactions are charged directly to your card via Google Cloud. It is ideal if you are a technical user (hacker) and want to optimize your costs as much as possible (usually cents per month).
public_pricing.pricing_64: If I am a talent on the Free Plan, can someone see my profile?
public_pricing.pricing_65: Sí. Tu perfil es 100% público y visible. The limitation of the free plan lies in the number of times the Digital Clone will respond to recruiters and in the storage of images. If you exceed 10 credits, your profile will still be visible, but AI Chat will be disabled until the following month (unless you upgrade to Pro or use BYOK).

public_about.about_6: Some time ago I found myself in a situation that you probably know very well:
public_about.about_7: I was unemployed, looking for work and sending dozens of PDF resumes that fell into a black hole.
public_about.about_8: As a developer and software architect, the frustration was twofold. I knew I had the talent, I knew the technologies (Vue, FastAPI, Artificial Intelligence, Vector Databases), but I had no way to demonstrate my true impact on a simple static A4 sheet. The traditional recruiting system was limiting me.
public_about.about_9: So I decided to hack the system.
public_about.about_10: I set out to build the ultimate tool for myself: an interactive, beautiful portfolio, equipped with my own "Digital Clone" powered by AI. An assistant that could answer technical questions from recruiters 24/7 while I slept or studied.
public_about.about_11: When I saw the result, I realized something bigger:
public_about.about_12: I was not the only one with this problem.
public_about.about_13: There were thousands of talented professionals in Latin America and the world being ignored because of an ATS (automatic system) or a boring PDF.
public_about.about_16: the technology. I adapted my code, created OppyTalent and opened it to the world.
public_about.about_17: I'll be completely honest with you: building this is my best resume. If this platform grows, my visibility grows and my opportunities too. By using OppyTalent, you are not only elevating your own professional career, you are supporting the work of an independent developer who seeks to change the rules of the game.
public_about.about_26: We build in public. We speak clearly about how Artificial Intelligence works (zero hallucinations, pure RAG) and we don't hide our story.
public_about.about_28: Your data is yours. We promote the
public_about.about_30: model with AES-256 encryption so you have absolute control of your costs and AI privacy.
public_about.about_32: From a personal project to being considered for global innovation initiatives such as the
public_about.about_34: . We build tools that challenge the status quo.
public_about.about_36: Whether you are looking to stand out in your next interview or discover hidden talent, there is a place for you at OppyTalent.

admin_storage.storage_2: Monitor your storage resources and AI magic (Requests) in real time.
admin_storage.storage_4: Space used by profile photos and project files.
admin_storage.storage_10: It is discounted when using the chat and translating CVs.
admin_storage.storage_14: Are you out of magic? Don't worry. You can use your own free Google Gemini API Key for AI interactions
admin_storage.storage_16: without having to pay for the Premium plan.
admin_storage.storage_19: Get my Gemini key for free
admin_storage.storage_25: . Show the world what you are capable of without restrictions.
admin_storage.storage_28: The "Re-index" button (or "Re-index AI Brain") is the tool that allows your AI assistant to "memorize" your data using the new mathematical architecture (vectors).
admin_storage.storage_29: When you click on it, the following happens in the backend:
admin_storage.storage_31: The system takes all the information you have in OppyTalent: your Profile, your Projects, your Experiences, Studies, etc., and deletes the previous mathematical memory so that there is no duplicate or old data.
admin_storage.storage_33: Send every bit of information (for example, a single project) to Google Gemini. Gemini reads the text and converts it into a long list of 768 decimal numbers. This list of numbers is called a "Vector". These vectors capture the "meaning" or "semantics" of the text. That is, the AI ​​stops seeing letters and starts seeing mathematical concepts.
admin_storage.storage_35: Save all those vectors to your PostgreSQL database (in the new PortfolioDocument table).
admin_storage.storage_36: How does it benefit you on a daily basis?
admin_storage.storage_37: Thanks to the fact that your information is now "Vectorized" (indexed), you can
admin_storage.storage_39: . When a recruiter goes to your portfolio and asks the Chatbot: "Have you worked with Python in the cloud?", magic happens:
admin_storage.storage_40: The chat converts that question to a vector.
admin_storage.storage_41: Mathematically compare the question with all your vectors in milliseconds.
admin_storage.storage_42: Find exactly the 3 or 4 projects/experiences that most closely match Python and Cloud.
admin_storage.storage_43: It passes only those 4 projects to Gemini to generate the response.
admin_storage.storage_45: Pressing the "Re-index" button is telling your AI: "I just uploaded new projects and changed my data. Please re-study my resume and convert it to math so you can be ultra-fast in responding and we don't use up all my request credits."

admin_frases.why_desc: Here you can add famous phrases, poems, inspiring quotes or thoughts that reflect your professional philosophy. These quotes will be displayed randomly in the AI Assistant window of your public portfolio, allowing visitors to connect more personally with you.

admin_chat.train_ai_desc: Train your AI. Tell it which project to highlight when a recruiter asks about a specific skill (Max {maxRules}).
admin_chat.no_skills: You have no Agent Skills configured. The AI will use its default criteria.
admin_chat.b2b_desc: By activating this, your profile ("Digital Clone") will be indexed in OppyTalent's private company Meta-Search engine. Headhunters will be able to find you automatically based on your skills and experience, and invite your AI to the "AI Tribunal" for pre-evaluation.
admin_chat.modal_desc: Instruct your AI with Markdown format to highlight your best attributes.
admin_chat.action_placeholder: Ex: **Highlight that I have experience with ESP32** and that the *FastAlert* project is the best example...
admin_chat.markdown_help: Use asterisks for **bold** or *italics*, and hyphens for bullets.
